    <h2>{`Ingress Controller`}</h2>
    <p>{`An ingress controller is required to manage external HTTP/HTTPS access to Cúram services running in the Kubernetes cluster.`}</p>
    <p>{`Cúram on Kubernetes uses the `}<strong parentName="p">{`F5 NGINX Ingress Controller`}</strong>{` (`}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`f5-nginx-ingress`}</inlineCode>{`).`}</p>

See the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
          "href": "#annotation-migration"
        }}>{`Annotation Migration`}</a>{` section below.`}</p>
    </InlineNotification>
    <h2>{`Installation`}</h2>
    <p>{`Refer to the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://docs.nginx.com/nginx-ingress-controller/"
      }}>{`F5 NGINX Ingress Controller documentation`}</a>{` for installation instructions appropriate to your target platform.`}</p>
    <p>{`Ensure the ingress controller is running and healthy in your cluster before deploying the Cúram Helm charts:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-shell"
      }}>{`kubectl get pods -n nginx-ingress
`}</code></pre>
    <h2>{`SSL Services`}</h2>
    <p>{`The F5 NGINX Ingress Controller uses the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`nginx.org/ssl-services`}</inlineCode>{` annotation to identify which backend services communicate over HTTPS.`}</p>
    <p>{`See the `}<a parentName="p" {...{

      }}>{`F5 NGINX ssl-services example`}</a>{` for further details.`}</p>
    <p>{`The Helm chart (`}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`helm-charts/spm/templates/ingress.yaml`}</inlineCode>{`) includes a commented-out `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`nginx.org/ssl-services`}</inlineCode>{` annotation listing all Cúram backend services. Before deploying, uncomment this annotation and replace `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`{release-name}`}</inlineCode>{` with your Helm release name, including only the services you have enabled:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-yaml"
      }}>{`nginx.org/ssl-services: "spm-apps-curam,spm-apps-rest,spm-uawebapp,spm-web"
`}</code></pre>

    <h2>{`Sticky Cookie Services`}</h2>
    <p>{`The F5 NGINX Ingress Controller uses the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`nginx.org/sticky-cookie-services`}</inlineCode>{` annotation to enable session affinity per service. Only stateful Liberty app services require sticky sessions — the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`web`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`uawebapp`}</inlineCode>{` services serve static content and do not need to be included.`}</p>
    <p>{`See the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://github.com/nginx/kubernetes-ingress/tree/v5.4.1/examples/ingress-resources/session-persistence"
      }}>{`F5 NGINX session-persistence example`}</a>{` for further details. The cookie parameters (`}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`cookieName`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`expires`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`domain`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`httponly`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`secure`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`path`}</inlineCode>{`) follow the same syntax as the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://nginx.org/en/docs/http/ngx_http_upstream_module.html#sticky"
      }}>{`NGINX sticky directive`}</a>{`.`}</p>
    <p>{`The Helm chart (`}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`helm-charts/spm/templates/ingress.yaml`}</inlineCode>{`) includes a commented-out `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`nginx.org/sticky-cookie-services`}</inlineCode>{` annotation. Before deploying, uncomment it and replace `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`{release-name}`}</inlineCode>{` with your Helm release name, including only the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`apps`}</inlineCode>{` services you have enabled:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-yaml"
      }}>{`nginx.org/sticky-cookie-services: "serviceName=spm-apps-curam srv_id expires=1h path=/Curam"
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Multiple services are separated by `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`;`}</inlineCode>{`. The full list of possible `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`apps`}</inlineCode>{` services is:`}</p>

    <h2>{`Annotation Migration`}</h2>
    <p>{`This section is for clients migrating from the community `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ingress-nginx`}</inlineCode>{` controller to the F5 NGINX Ingress Controller.`}</p>
    <p>{`The Helm chart retains the community `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ingress-nginx`}</inlineCode>{` annotations for backwards compatibility and includes the F5 equivalents commented out. When you are ready to migrate, replace the community annotations with the F5 equivalents as shown below.`}</p>
    <InlineNotification mdxType="InlineNotification">
      <p><strong parentName="p">{`Note:`}</strong>{` F5 NGINX uses two annotation namespaces. `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`nginx.org/`}</inlineCode>{` is used for F5-specific features such as SSL services and session persistence. `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`nginx.org/`}</inlineCode>{` is used for standard NGINX configuration such as timeouts and server snippets. Both are required as part of a full migration.`}</p>
    </InlineNotification>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Before (community `}<inlineCode parentName="strong">{`ingress-nginx`}</inlineCode>{`)`}</strong></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-yaml"
      }}>{`annotations:
  nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/affinity: cookie
  nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/backend-protocol: HTTPS
  nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/session-cookie-path: /
  nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-read-timeout: "150"
  nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/server-snippet: |
    gzip on;
    gzip_types application/atom+xml application/javascript ...;
`}</code></pre>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`After (F5 NGINX Ingress Controller)`}</strong></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-yaml"
      }}>{`annotations:
  nginx.org/ssl-services: "spm-apps-curam,spm-apps-rest,spm-uawebapp,spm-web"
  nginx.org/sticky-cookie-services: "serviceName=spm-apps-curam srv_id expires=1h path=/;serviceName=spm-apps-rest srv_id expires=1h path=/"
  nginx.org/proxy-read-timeout: "150s"
  nginx.org/server-snippets: |
    gzip on;
    gzip_types application/atom+xml application/javascript ...;
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Key differences:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`HTTPS backends`}</strong>{` — replace `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/backend-protocol: HTTPS`}</inlineCode>{` with `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`nginx.org/ssl-services`}</inlineCode>{` listing each backend service by name.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Session affinity`}</strong>{` — replace `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/affinity: cookie`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`session-cookie-path`}</inlineCode>{` with `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`nginx.org/sticky-cookie-services`}</inlineCode>{`, which combines affinity and cookie configuration per service in a single annotation.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Read timeout`}</strong>{` — replace `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-read-timeout: "150"`}</inlineCode>{` with `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`nginx.org/proxy-read-timeout: "150s"`}</inlineCode>{`. Note the unit suffix is required by F5 NGINX.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Server config`}</strong>{` — replace `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/server-snippet`}</inlineCode>{` with `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`nginx.org/server-snippets`}</inlineCode>{`. Multi-line blocks are supported in both.`}</li>
    </ul>

    </MDXLayout>;
